purpose: Visual and renderer validation before the 20-post monthly batch.
review_rule: Do not scale to the full campaign until all four pilot posts are reviewed in Admin Marketing.

posts.focal_instruction: Keep the visible dashboard progress area intact; crop only surrounding non-essential chrome.
posts.reason: Tests a clean light-mode product-proof post using the dashboard.

renderer_fields.headline: Progress needs a memory.
renderer_fields.supporting_text: See what moved, even when the week was not perfect.

posts.focal_instruction: Keep the rhythm-selection control fully legible and centered.
posts.reason: Tests a concise educational module post without inventing a feature.

renderer_fields.headline: Rhythm means intended frequency.
renderer_fields.supporting_text: Choose a pace you can actually keep.

posts.reason: Tests a real product-led carousel with varied slides and two distinct calibration states.

slides.headline: Growth Calibration is monthly.
slides.supporting_text: Review the month. Adjust the next one.

slides.headline: A rough month is not a reset.
slides.supporting_text: It is information for the next step.

slides.focal_instruction: Keep the adjustment controls and progress context visible.
slides.headline: Use the month to recalibrate.
Build a rhythm that survives real weeks.

posts.focal_instruction: Keep the energy/balance visualization large, clear and semantically unchanged.
posts.reason: Tests a controlled dark-mode module spotlight using real data visualization.

renderer_fields.headline: Daily Energy shows momentum.
renderer_fields.supporting_text: A clearer view of the week you actually lived.
